case_title: MARCELLA GRIES VS. PHYLLIS MASON ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 17030012) EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS/HIS/HER OWN ATTORNEY FESS AND LEGAL COSTS.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-28-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRIES, MARCELLA AS TO DEFENDANT MASON, PHYLLIS DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-26-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-22-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-03-2016

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-24-2017 CONTINUED TO MAR-28-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-26-2016 CONTINUED TO DEC-07-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-24-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-07-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-24-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ARNE J NELSON, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-24-2017, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-08-2017. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
